articles.title: Beloved Raccoon Jimothy Outed as Trump Supporter, Seattle Community Reels
articles.preview: The viral short-spine raccoon from Ballard has been spotted hanging with known MAGA patriots Bandit and Fred. Cancellations and calls for a new 'RICE' agency ensue.

articles.title: Beloved Short-Spine Raccoon Jimothy Outed as Secret Trump Supporter, Seattle in Full Meltdown
articles.preview: The viral Ballard raccoon has been photographed with known MAGA patriots Bandit and Fred. Calls for a new RICE agency and deportation are trending.
